package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to version 14.15.0 or higher to align with JDK 11 era tooling standards.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) are incompatible with modern build tools and dependencies required for the new JHipster version, causing installation or runtime failures.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build scripts with Angular CLI and Webpack-based scripts.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is removed from dependencies; the old scripts would fail because the 'grunt' command is no longer available.
The application has migrated from a legacy frontend stack to Angular, requiring these core libraries to compile and run.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular CLI and build tooling dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: Required to execute the new build scripts (ng build, ng serve) which replace the old Grunt tasks.
The old Karma/Jasmine setup is replaced by Jest and Protractor; old tests would fail to run without these new tools.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 1.x datasource configuration to Spring Boot 2.x HikariCP format.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed support for `spring.datasource.dataSourceClassName` and `spring.datasource.databaseName`/`serverName` for H2; it requires `spring.datasource.type` and standard JDBC URL properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
datasource:
        dataSourceClassName: org.h2.jdbcx.JdbcDataSource
        url: jdbc:h2:mem:jhipster;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1
        databaseName: 
        serverName: 
        username: 
        password:
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
datasource:
    type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource
    url: jdbc:h2:mem:jhipsterhazelcastsampleapplication;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=FALSE
    username: jhipsterHazelcastSampleApplication
    password:
    hikari:
      poolName: Hikari
      auto-commit: false

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update JPA Hibernate properties to Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions and remove deprecated settings.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renames `spring.jpa.hibernate.naming-strategy` to `spring.jpa.hibernate.naming.physical-strategy` (or removes it in favor of default) and changes `spring.jpa.database` to `spring.jpa.database-platform`; old properties cause binding errors or are ignored.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
jpa:
        database-platform: com.mycompany.myapp.domain.util.FixedH2Dialect
        database: H2
        openInView: false
        show_sql: true
        generate-ddl: false
        hibernate:
            ddl-auto: none
            naming-strategy: org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate Liquibase configuration from root level to Spring Boot 2.x nested `spring.liquibase` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x requires Liquibase properties to be under `spring.liquibase`; root-level `liquibase:` properties are no longer bound automatically.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
liquibase:
    # Remove 'faker' if you do not want the sample data to be loaded automatically
    contexts: dev, faker

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Remove Spring Boot 1.x specific metrics configuration (Spark/Graphite) which is replaced by Micrometer in Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `spring.metrics` namespace for Spark/Graphite; these properties are invalid and may cause binding failures or be ignored, requiring migration to Micrometer if needed.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 9999
    graphite:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 2003
        prefix: jhipster

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf configuration to remove deprecated `mode: XHTML` setting.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x / Thymeleaf 3.x defaults to HTML5 mode; `mode: XHTML` is deprecated/removed and may cause startup errors or warnings.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update message cache duration property to ISO 8601 duration format required by Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x `spring.messages.cache-duration` expects a Duration (e.g., PT1S) instead of seconds integer; old format causes binding failure.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
messages:
    cache-duration: PT1S # 1 second, see the ISO 8601 standard

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource class is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions, and Spring Boot 2.x defaults to HikariCP; using the old class causes runtime initialization failures or classpath errors.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update MySQL JDBC URL to include timezone and SSL parameters required by newer MySQL Connector/J.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Newer MySQL Connector/J versions (8.0+) require explicit serverTimezone and useSSL settings; omitting them causes runtime exceptions or connection failures due to strict timezone handling and SSL defaults.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace deprecated Hibernate naming strategy with standard JPA configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy class was removed in Hibernate 5.2+; retaining it causes a ClassNotFoundException at startup.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate metrics configuration from Spring Boot 1.x metrics to Spring Boot 2.x Micrometer management properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'metrics' namespace and Spark/Graphite exporters were removed in Spring Boot 2.x; using them causes configuration binding errors or missing bean exceptions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Liquibase configuration property from 'context' to 'contexts' to match Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renamed the Liquibase context property to 'contexts'; using the old 'context' key results in the property being ignored, potentially causing schema update failures.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 1.x management endpoint configuration to Spring Boot 2.x structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `endpoints.*` properties; using them causes configuration binding failures or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task executor configuration from custom `async` namespace to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task.execution` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration for `ThreadPoolTaskExecutor` binds to `spring.task.execution`, not a custom `async` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-hazelcast-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration from custom `mail` namespace to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration for JavaMailSender binds to `spring.mail`, not a custom `mail` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger configuration from custom `swagger` namespace to JHipster-specific `jhipster.api-docs` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The custom `swagger` namespace is no longer recognized by the updated JHipster configuration properties class.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterHazelcastSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterHazelcastSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific JPA and Hibernate configuration properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes default behaviors for JPA repositories and Hibernate; explicit configuration is required to maintain performance and compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  data:
    jpa:
      repositories:
        bootstrap-mode: deferred
  jpa:
    open-in-view: false
    properties:
      hibernate.jdbc.time_zone: UTC
      hibernate.id.new_generator_mappings: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x server servlet session configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x moves session configuration under `server.servlet.session`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
server:
  servlet:
    session:
      cookie:
        http-only: true
